channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Lindsey Vonn’s Olympic Comeback Teaches About Facing Risk in Leadership
item.description: If you make the call, you carry the outcome.

item.title: The New AI Marketing Playbook: 5 Founder-Tested Tactics That Save Hours
item.description: How companies are using agents and other AI tools to stretch their work.

item.title: Science Says Rich People Aren’t Inherently Smarter. Mark Cuban Agrees
item.description: IQ seems important, but the three things–all of which anyone can control–matter most.

item.title: ‘I sell millions of Halloween costumes to Americans. Mr. President—here’s my takeaway from the wild tariffs ride’
item.description: Why President Trump's tariffs may not be the boon to reshoring he imagines.

item.title: Nvidia’s record quarter and what it signals for CFOs: ‘Compute equals revenue’
item.description: As hyperscalers pour billions into AI, Nvidia’s results offer a new benchmark for capital spending on compute.

item.title: Try these simple email tricks to get faster replies
item.description: Your colleagues decide in less than a minute whether your email is worth replying to. Microsoft’s 2025 Work Trend Index Report shows that the average ...

item.title: How AI and Automation Are Reshaping Business Worth
item.description: Technology is ready to augment business valuations (once the data catches up).

item.title: How AI evolved from quest for a mathematical theory of the mind
item.description: Below, Tom Griffiths shares five key insights from his new book, The Laws of Thought: The Quest for a Mathematical Theory of the Mind . Griffiths is a...

item.title: Why Holding Back Hurts Your Team — and How Smart Managers Build Trust That Drives Results
item.description: Transparency — even when it’s hard — is a hidden catalyst for team success.

item.title: The rise of “always-on” accounting for rental businesses
item.description: For most of modern business history, accounting has been something leaders looked at periodically. Numbers were reviewed and reports arrived on a sche...

item.title: Exclusive: Crypto trading platform raises $30 million from CMT Digital and Kraken
item.description: The fundraise for STS Digital, whose product is aimed at institutions, also included Arrington Capital and an investment arm of Fidelity.

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into Binance over allegations it fired investigators who flagged that more than $1 billion flowed to Iranian entities
item.description: The probe comes after a Fortune investigation raised questions about the crypto firm’s compliance program.

item.title: Bet on talent, not just AI
item.description: For decades, digital transformation raised hopes of simpler work. And while many companies found complexity instead of clarity, the story isn’t over. ...

item.title: Trump didn’t mention the $38.8 trillion national debt once in his State of the Union, but 90% of voters are worried
item.description: "Kitchen table cost-of-living issues" are top of mind right now, the Peterson Foundation says, and voters connect them to the spiralling national debt...

item.title: Axe just made it way harder to overuse its body spray
item.description: There are a few odors from adolescence that are seared into the brains of most Americans who grew up after the 1980s: the aroma of freshly baked brick...
